description: Rise of Avalon Patch 2 Hotfix 3 (29 August 2020) — [Windows] Smart Cluster Queue rejoin fix under Silence effect.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: [Windows] Resolved an issue where players kicked from a cluster by the Smart Cluster Queue were unable to rejoin the queue while still under the Silence effect of the queue. (Fix for other platforms to be deployed in an upcoming patch.)
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Windows Smart Cluster Queue kicked rejoin Silence effect platforms
